esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
// activemq.queue.blocked.sends is counter_long; dimension: activemq.destination.name
| WHERE activemq.queue.blocked.sends IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.queue.blocked.sends)) BY activemq.broker.name, activemq.destination.name
// Any blocked sends indicate memory pressure — critical signal
| WHERE blocked_rate > 0
| SORT blocked_rate DESC
| LIMIT 10
